formula: var n=parseFloat(inputs.n)||0;var r=parseFloat(inputs.r)||0;var num=1;for(var i=0;i<r;i++)num*=n-i;var den=1;return{perm:num};

es.name: Permutaciones
es.description: Calcula las permutaciones de n elementos tomados de r en r.
es.seo_description: Calcula las permutaciones de n elementos tomados de r en r. Calculadora gratuita, precisa e instantánea. Obten resultados al instante con explicacion.
es.example_label: Find the number of permutations when selecting 3 items from 8 distinct items.
es.result_context: The permutations {perm} count the number of ways to arrange r items from n when order matters.
mistakes: Using combinations fórmula instead of permutations
Allowing r > n which gives invalid results
Confusing when order matters vs doesn't matter
